ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Alex,

We hope you’re enjoying the benefits of our SaaS platform. Our records show that your subscription for the Advanced Analytics module is set to expire on 15 May 2026. To ensure uninterrupted access to all features, please review and renew your subscription at your earliest convenience.

If you need to update your billing information or change the plan level, simply log in to your account and navigate to the Billing section. For any questions or assistance, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing our services.

Best regards,

Jordan Lee
Customer Success Manager
Acme SaaS Solutions
<URL>

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: HR Payroll System Update Needed
spam.body:
Dear Team,

This is an urgent notice from the HR & Payroll Department regarding a critical update to our payroll processing system. Failure to complete the update by 30 April 2026 will result in delayed salary disbursements and potential compliance violations.

Please verify your employee details and upload the required documentation by logging into the HR portal using the link below:

<URL>

If you do not comply within the specified deadline, your payroll will be automatically suspended and you may be subject to additional penalties.

For any questions, contact the Payroll Support Desk immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Marianne Smith
HR & Payroll Director
Acme Company
